_comment.1: Open-loop plant Bode of the y/tip axis: command -> FSM -> camera -> CoM.
_comment.2: SOFTWARE injection: bode_plot replaces the y element (0; CoM is [y, x])
_comment.3: with a sine each iteration, and piplate_bridge writes offset + sine*scale
_comment.4: to DAC ch0 every cycle. See conf_bode_x.json for the full rationale
_comment.5: (whole-frame CoM, no acquisition phase, baud 921600 pacing, 2310 Hz loop).
_comment.6: x/tilt (ch1) and the coarse channels are parked at their bias voltages.
_comment.7: Amplitude starts lower than x: the y mechanical gain was ~3x x on the
_comment.8: old (stale) sweeps; raise it if |H| comes back small.

params._roi_note: ROI centred on beam at coarse bias 2/2 (fine 1.5/2.15): probe-verified 2026-07-21, full-sensor CoM (x 919, y 507). Re-derive via contrib/probe_frame.json only on an alignment change.

pipeline._comment: frame -> UDP viewer, so you can watch the beam + tracking (same as steering_fsp)

params._note: tracked 15x15 window, threshold 30 -- matches attenuation_test.json exactly so the sweep measures the same sensor the loop sees. Initialized on the beam (frame centre) with no acquisition phase: bode_plot injects from the first frame, and the stray reflection at ROI (10,28) must stay out of the sum. Output is image-normalized.

pipeline._comment: CoM -> UDP viewer so the tracked centroid can be overlaid on the frame
Replace the y/tip element (0) with the swept sine; read CoM y as response

params._tuning: v2 (2026-07-17): 60 log points x 49 cycles, 7 integer-cycle segments per point for per-point error bars + coherence quality (<0.9 flagged). Integer-cycle segment boundaries remove the partial-cycle DC/line leakage of the old fixed-time cutoff. freq_start 5 Hz (was 1): the flat+delay plant is fully pinned by the 5-30 Hz K band and 49 cycles at 1 Hz would cost ~50 s/point.
params._amplitude2: half-amplitude linearity/clipping check; bode_plot flags a >10% |H| change between amplitudes. RAISED 2026-07-21 from 0.15/0.075: at that drive the y response was only ~1.1/0.55 px, inside the y FSM stiction/dead-zone (mag2 < mag by ~15%, flagged NONLINEAR). 0.3/0.15 drives ~2.2 px, matching the x sweep's clean regime. Since Ky (0.46) < Kx (0.69), y needs a larger command than x for the same response.
params.config: y/tip open-loop plant, coarse bias 2.0/2.0 (beam realigned, matches steering_tuned.json operating point), 32x32 exp250 gain100 bw100, beam-centred ROI via start_x/start_y, tracked 20x20 thr22. Re-bode at the new bias to refresh Ky/tau. Beam now centred so the 07-21 y-clipping (beam parked row 23/32) should be gone; K uses <=30 Hz, tau uses full 5-300 Hz slope.
params._start_delay: hold injection at 0 (= fine channel parked at its bias) for 30 s so the coarse channels have time to adjust before the sweep starts

pipeline._note: same mapping as steering_tuned.json: ch0=y(idx0, driven), ch1=x(idx1, parked), ch2/ch3 coarse parked. Coarse offsets 2.0/2.0 = current operating point (beam realigned, matches steering_tuned.json); was 1.5/2.15 (07-21), 1.2/2.45 (07-20), 1.98/1.97 (07-17), 1.95/2.02 (07-16), 2.52/1.62 (07-14), 2.7/1.65 (07-13), 0.8/2.394 (07-10).
